title: helichrysum rupestre f. latifolium
intro: Helichrysum rupestre f. latifolium is a subspecies of the Helichrysum rupestre plant, a species of flowering plant in the daisy family Asteraceae, native to South Africa. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to reduce inflammation and promote healing in wounds, due to the presence of sesquiterpene compounds such as nerolidol and dihydrofuranosesquiterpene. The health benefits of Helichrysum rupestre f. latifolium include its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression, reduce inflammation, and improve wound healing, among others. The herbal preparations of this plant include essential oil, which can be used topically or aromatically, and dried flowers, which can be used in teas or infusions for its medicinal properties.
